ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* The name of the CEO */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* The location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* The company's official website */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* The market capitalization of the company */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* The number of employees in the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fiscal_periods" (
  "fiscal_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fiscal period */,
  "fiscal_date_ending" TEXT /* Date the fiscal period ends */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the period */,
  "fiscal_quarter" TEXT /* Fiscal quarter of the period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal period */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the fiscal period is completed */,
  "reporting_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency of reporting (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fiscal_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_statements" (
  "income_statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income statement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "fiscal_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal period */,
  "reported_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the financials are reported */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue */,
  "cost_of_revenue" REAL /* Cost of revenue */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit */,
  "operating_income" REAL /* Operating income */,
  "net_income_from_continuing_operations" REAL /* Net income from continuing operations */,
  "net_income_common_stockholders" REAL /* Net income for common stockholders */,
  "basic_eps" REAL /* Basic earnings per share */,
  "diluted_eps" REAL /* Diluted earnings per share */,
  "ebit" REAL /* Earnings before interest and taxes */,
  "ebitda" REAL /* Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the financial statement to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the statement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the statement was last updated */,
  "prepared_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who prepared the statement */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who reviewed the statement */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the statement is final */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_statements_fiscal_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_period_id") REFERENCES fiscal_periods ("fiscal_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_statements_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_statements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_statements_prepared_by FOREIGN KEY ("prepared_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balance_sheets" (
  "balance_sheet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance sheet */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "fiscal_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal period */,
  "reported_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the financials are reported */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities */,
  "total_equity" REAL /* Total equity */,
  "total_stockholder_equity" REAL /* Total stockholder equity */,
  "total_current_assets" REAL /* Total current assets */,
  "total_current_liabilities" REAL /* Total current liabilities */,
  "long_term_debt" REAL /* Long-term debt */,
  "cash_and_cash_equivalents" REAL /* Cash and cash equivalents */,
  "short_term_investments" REAL /* Short-term investments */,
  "long_term_investments" REAL /* Long-term investments */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the financial statement to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the statement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the statement was last updated */,
  "prepared_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who prepared the statement */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who reviewed the statement */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the statement is final */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_sheet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balance_sheets_fiscal_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_period_id") REFERENCES fiscal_periods ("fiscal_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balance_sheets_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balance_sheets_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balance_sheets_prepared_by FOREIGN KEY ("prepared_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* A hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "team" TEXT /* The team the user belongs to (e.g., finance, data science, IT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company whose data is accessed */,
  "fiscal_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal period */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the browser or client used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_fiscal_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_period_id") REFERENCES fiscal_periods ("fiscal_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "fiscal_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fiscal period */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., ROE, ROA, EPS) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the financial metric to track changes over time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the metric was last updated */,
  "prepared_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who prepared the metric */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who reviewed the metric */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating whether the metric is final */,
  "source_statement_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the financial statement from which the metric was derived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_fiscal_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("fiscal_period_id") REFERENCES fiscal_periods ("fiscal_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_prepared_by FOREIGN KEY ("prepared_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
